title: Reserve Your Spot With These Hotels The Analysts Support
text: Results from Delta Airlines (NYSE: DAL) to Booking.com (NASDAQ: BKNG) have put the bid back into travel and leisure stocks. Recently launched travel and leisure ETFs like Defiance Hotel, Airline and Cruise ETF (NYSEARCA: CRUZ) and ALPs Fund Services Global Travel Beneficiaries ETF (NYSE: JRNY) are up about 30% off of their 2022 lows and heading higher if the analysts have anything to do with it.

title: Why Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (HLT) is a Top Growth Stock for the Long-Term
text: Whether you're a value, growth, or momentum investor, finding strong stocks becomes easier with the Zacks Style Scores, a top feature of the Zacks Premium research service.

title: Hilton Worldwide Holdings: RevPAR Growth For Conrad Hotels & Resorts Brand Encouraging
text: Hilton Worldwide Holdings saw strong growth in earnings in the most recent quarter. While RevPAR growth for the Waldorf Astoria brand seems to be plateauing, that of Conrad Hotels & Resorts continues to see growth.

title: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (HLT) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. title: Hilton (HLT) Q4 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Stock Up
text: Hilton's (HLT) fourth-quarter performance benefits from a rise in leisure demand and improvements in transient and group businesses.

title: Hilton Worldwide shares climb after 4Q earnings beat Wall Street estimates by $0.36
text: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc (NYSE:HLT) shares climbed after the hospitality giant posted strong fourth-quarter earnings that beat Wall Street estimates by $0.36.    For the period ended December 31, 2022, the McLean, Virginia-based group with a broad portfolio of hotels and resorts posted earnings per share of $1.59, $0.36 better than analyst estimates of $1.23.

title: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (HLT) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (HLT) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 32.50% and 4.57%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Hilton stock rises toward 9-month high after profit more than doubles to beat expectations
text: Shares of Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. HLT, -0.61% hiked up 2.4% toward a nine-month high in premarket trading Thursday, after the hotel operator reported fourth-quarter profit that more than doubled and beat expectations, as revenue per available room (RevPAR) exceeded pre-pandemic levels for the second straight quarter. Net income rose to $332 million, or $1.21 a share, from $147 million, or 52 cents a share, in the year-ago period.

title: Hilton Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results
text: MCLEAN, Va.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. ("Hilton" or the "Company") (NYSE: HLT) today reported its fourth quarter and full year 2022 results. title: Best undervalued Bill Ackman stocks for 2023
text: Bill Ackman, the billionaire investor, has had a stellar performance in Wall Street over the years. Between January 2004 and August last year, his fund had a compound annual return of about 15.5% compared to S&P's 15.5%.

title: Hilton (HLT) Gears Up for Q4 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Hilton's (HLT) fourth-quarter results are likely to reflect benefits from an increase in demand, loyalty program and unit expansion efforts.

title: 73.79% of Billionaire Bill Ackman's Portfolio Is in These 4 Stocks
